paid_credit_api_calls.note: apply_reached/evaluate_reached/adoption_gate_ever_passed/promote_reached are the best-known cumulative state across runs 1-6. Runs 5 (2026-06-15) and 6 (2026-06-16) both reached apply and evaluate but were rejected by the adoption gate because the candidate score regressed below previous_best=729.34. promote was never reached.

propose_side_hardening.meaning: The Gemini propose prompt now states an explicit baseline-preservation contract: keep all five symbolic indicators (path_traversal_indicator, script_injection_indicator, sqli_indicator, command_delimiter_indicator, encoded_traversal_indicator), keep the full request inspection surface (method, path, query, headers, body), keep the final non-blocking blocked=False fallback return, and make a minimal additive edit that scores strictly above previous_best (currently 939.34 after PR #105 fitness gate fix; propose prompt reads best_score from genome.json dynamically). Prompt-only/documentation change; no API call, no detector/policy/budget/model/ledger change.

fitness_gate_fix.meaning: Score is now generation-invariant. A no-op candidate can no longer pass the gate.
